hooks.command: node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const cmd=(p.tool_input?.command||''); if(!/git commit/.test(cmd)||/--no-verify/.test(cmd)) process.exit(0); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const ROOT=process.cwd(); try{execSync('bash '+ROOT+'/.harness/run.sh --from-git-staged',{cwd:ROOT,stdio:'inherit',timeout:300000});}catch(e){process.exit(1);}"

node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const f=(p.tool_input?.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); const ROOT=process.cwd().replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); if(!f.includes(ROOT+'/backend/')&&!f.includes(ROOT+'/frontend/')) process.exit(0); const isJava=/\.java$/.test(f)&&f.includes('/src/main/'); const isTs=/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(f)&&f.includes('/frontend/src/')&&!f.includes('.test.'); if(!isJava&&!isTs) process.exit(0); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{execSync('bash '+ROOT+'/.harness/run.sh --files '+f,{cwd:ROOT,stdio:'inherit',timeout:300000});}catch(e){}"

node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const ROOT=process.cwd(); try{ const branch=execSync('git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD',{cwd:ROOT,encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); if(branch==='main'){const s=execSync('git diff --stat HEAD',{cwd:ROOT,encoding:'utf8'});if(s.trim()){console.log('\n=== Session Changes ===');console.log(s);} process.exit(0);} const ahead=execSync('git rev-list main..'+branch+' --count',{cwd:ROOT,encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); if(ahead==='0'){console.log('[stop] worktree에 새 커밋 없음. 건너뜀.');process.exit(0);} console.log('[stop] '+ahead+'개 커밋을 main에 merge 후 push합니다...'); execSync('git -C '+ROOT+' checkout main',{stdio:'inherit'}); execSync('git -C '+ROOT+' merge --ff-only '+branch,{stdio:'inherit'}); execSync('git -C '+ROOT+' push origin main',{stdio:'inherit'}); execSync('git -C '+ROOT+' checkout '+branch,{stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('[stop] GitHub push 완료');}catch(e){console.error('[stop] 자동 push 실패:',e.message);}"
